quality_rationale: Leads with the decision rather than burying it behind setup.
Keeps evidence and risk visible while still producing a readable executive narrative.
Maps cleanly to both HTML and PPT export paths.
narrative_patterns: visible appendix trace for deeper evidence
visual_patterns: risk matrix with explicit mitigation panel
licensing_and_usage_notes: Internal reference sample only; reuse the governed pattern logic and theme tokens, not unreviewed external design assets.
